author: DilpreetBansi
name: AR Self-Gen GPTQ + XSA-all + Legal Score-First TTT
blurb: First demonstration of TTT on GPTQ-quantized models. LoRA-constrained TTT (rank-8 on Q/V, ~158K params) keeps model in GPTQ basin while adapting to validation distribution. Extended eval context (4096 tokens), layer-wise LR decay, cosine schedule. Built on PR #1019 SOTA stack.
technique_summary: PR #1019 stack + LoRA TTT (rank-8 Q/V, lr=0.01, 3 epochs, 32K chunks, extended 4096 eval, layer-wise LR decay 0.7, cosine schedule)
